mapper.select:
SELECT t.id AS trainerId, t.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.phone AS phoneNum, u.profile_image AS profileImg, t.trainer_type AS trainerType, t.approval_status AS approvalStatus, ( COUNT(DISTINCT mp.member_id) + COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.client_id IS NOT NULL AND mp2.member_id IS NULL THEN l.client_id END) ) AS memberCount
FROM TRAINER t
JOIN `USER` u ON t.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON t.id = mp.trainer_id AND mp.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN LESSON l ON l.trainer_id = t.id AND l.status != '취소'
LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp2 ON mp2.member_id = l.client_id AND mp2.trainer_id = l.trainer_id
WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymId} AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND u.is_deleted = false
AND ( u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(t.id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY t.id, t.user_id, u.name, u.phone, u.profile_image, t.trainer_type, t.approval_status
ORDER BY t.id DESC

SELECT memberId, memberName, membershipName, remainingSession, startDate FROM ( SELECT m.id AS memberId, u.name AS memberName, CONCAT('PT ', ms.type_rep, '회') AS membershipName, IFNULL(mp.lesson_count, 0) AS remainingSession, DATE_FORMAT(mp.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mp JOIN TRAINER t ON mp.trainer_id = t.id JOIN MEMBER m ON mp.member_id = m.id JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP ms ON mp.membership_id = ms.id WHERE mp.trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND t.gym_id = #{gymId} AND mp.status = 'active' AND ms.type = 'pt'
UNION ALL
SELECT m.id AS memberId, u.name AS memberName, 'PT 예약회원' AS membershipName, 0 AS remainingSession, DATE_FORMAT(l.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate FROM LESSON l JOIN TRAINER t ON l.trainer_id = t.id JOIN MEMBER m ON l.client_id = m.id JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE l.trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND t.gym_id = #{gymId} AND l.status != '취소' AND STR_TO_DATE(l.lesson_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= CURDATE() AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mp WHERE mp.member_id = l.client_id AND mp.trainer_id = l.trainer_id AND mp.status = 'active' ) ) x ORDER BY startDate DESC

SELECT memberId, memberName, membershipName, remainingSession, startDate FROM (
SELECT m.id AS memberId, u.name AS memberName, CONCAT('PT ', ms.type_rep, '회') AS membershipName, IFNULL(mp.lesson_count, 0) AS remainingSession, DATE_FORMAT(mp.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mp JOIN TRAINER t ON mp.trainer_id = t.id JOIN MEMBER m ON mp.member_id = m.id JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP ms ON mp.membership_id = ms.id WHERE mp.trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND t.gym_id = #{gymId} AND mp.status = 'expired' AND ms.type = 'pt'
UNION ALL
SELECT m.id AS memberId, u.name AS memberName, 'PT 예약회원' AS membershipName, 0 AS remainingSession, DATE_FORMAT(l.lesson_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate FROM LESSON l JOIN TRAINER t ON l.trainer_id = t.id JOIN MEMBER m ON l.client_id = m.id JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE l.trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND t.gym_id = #{gymId} AND l.status != '취소' AND STR_TO_DATE(l.lesson_date, '%Y-%m-%d') < CURDATE() AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mp WHERE mp.member_id = l.client_id AND mp.trainer_id = l.trainer_id AND mp.status = 'active' ) ) x ORDER BY startDate DESC
